title: Merge Triplets to Form Target Triplet
problem_statement: Determine whether a target triplet can be formed by merging selected triplets component-wise, where merging takes the maximum value for each index.
intuition: Collect triplets that do not exceed target values and ensure each target component can be achieved by taking maximums.

approaches.name: Component-wise greedy check
approaches.description: Track the best candidate for each of the three indices using valid triplets, and verify whether all target components can be matched.
approaches.why_not: Brute forcing all combinations is exponential; the problem reduces to whether each target coordinate can be reached by some triplet without exceeding other target values.

interview_qa.q: Why ignore triplets with values greater than target?
interview_qa.a: Because merging takes maximums, any exceeding value would overshoot the target in that dimension.

interview_qa.q: What does each tracked coordinate represent?
interview_qa.a: The best achievable value for each component from valid candidate triplets.
